matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100100 2
1 10000011 3
2 10100001 3
3 10100101 4
4 10101100 4
5 00111110 5
6 01101000 3
7 01000011 3

70 07 00100000 1

47 74 00000010 1
